languages.text: В распоряжении Лорда-капитана еще не оказывалось имплантов такого высокого класса, как недавно обретенные. Чтобы понять тонкости их установки, нужно обратиться к специалистам.
The Lord Captain has never had implants as high-grade as the newly acquired ones at {mf|his|her} disposal. To understand the intricacies of their installation, an expert must be consulted.
languages.original_text: В распоряжении Лорда-капитана еще не оказывалось имплантов такого высокого класса, как недавно обретенные. Чтобы понять тонкости их установки, нужно обратиться к специалистам.

traits.locale_text: The Lord Captain has never had implants as high-grade as the newly acquired ones at {mf|his|her} disposal. To understand the intricacies of their installation, an expert must be consulted.
You have never had implants as high-grade as the newly acquired ones at your disposal. To understand the intricacies of their installation, you must consult a specialist.
You have never had implants as high-grade as the newly acquired ones at your disposal. To understand the intricacies of their installation, you must consult a specialist.
The Lord Captain has never had implants as high-grade as the newly acquired ones at {mf|his|her} disposal. To understand the intricacies of their installation, an expert must be consulted.

languages.text: 今までに手に入れたものほど高品質なインプラントはなかったでしょう。その複雑な取り付け方を知るには、専門家に相談する必要があります。
languages.original_text: You have never had implants as high-grade as the newly acquired ones at your disposal. To understand the intricacies of their installation, you must consult a specialist.

traits.locale_text: 今までに手に入れたものほど高品質なインプラントはなかったでしょう。その複雑な取り付け方を知るには、専門家に相談する必要があります。

languages.text: {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán nunca ha tenido a su disposición implantes de tanta calidad como los que acaba de obtener. Para entender las complejidades de su instalación, necesitará consultar a un especialista.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has never had implants as high-grade as the newly acquired ones at {mf|his|her} disposal. To understand the intricacies of their installation, an expert must be consulted.

traits.locale_text: {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán nunca ha tenido a su disposición implantes de tanta calidad como los que acaba de obtener. Para entender las complejidades de su instalación, necesitará consultar a un especialista.

languages.text: 舰长大人从未拥有过如此高级的植入物。为理解其复杂的安装过程，{mf|他|她}必须咨询一位专家。
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has never had implants as high-grade as the newly acquired ones at {mf|his|her} disposal. To understand the intricacies of their installation, an expert must be consulted.

traits.locale_text: 舰长大人从未拥有过如此高级的植入物。为理解其复杂的安装过程，{mf|他|她}必须咨询一位专家。

languages.text: Der Lord Captain hatte noch nie derart hochwertige Implantate. Um die Feinheiten ihrer Installation zu verstehen, musst du einen Experten aufsuchen.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has never had implants as high-grade as the newly acquired ones at {mf|his|her} disposal. To understand the intricacies of their installation, an expert must be consulted.

traits.locale_text: Der Lord Captain hatte noch nie derart hochwertige Implantate. Um die Feinheiten ihrer Installation zu verstehen, musst du einen Experten aufsuchen.

languages.text: Lord Kaptan'ın elinin altında hiç yeni edindiklerin kadar kaliteli implantlar olmamıştı. Kurulumlarının inceliklerini anlamak için bir uzmana danışılmalı.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has never had implants as high-grade as the newly acquired ones at {mf|his|her} disposal. To understand the intricacies of their installation, an expert must be consulted.

traits.locale_text: Lord Kaptan'ın elinin altında hiç yeni edindiklerin kadar kaliteli implantlar olmamıştı. Kurulumlarının inceliklerini anlamak için bir uzmana danışılmalı.

languages.text: C'est la première fois que {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} a en sa possession des implants aussi performants. Pour comprendre les subtilités liées à leur installation, il convient de consulter un spécialiste.
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has never had implants as high-grade as the newly acquired ones at {mf|his|her} disposal. To understand the intricacies of their installation, an expert must be consulted.

traits.locale_text: C'est la première fois que {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} a en sa possession des implants aussi performants. Pour comprendre les subtilités liées à leur installation, il convient de consulter un spécialiste.
